assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 2 (L4 pool) and Phase 3 (A100 pool) with distinct upgrade strategies and different considerations for each

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response creates a new node pool rather than using maxSurge for rolling upgrade, and doesn't mention maxSurge parameter at all

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver compatibility or potential issues with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Wait for fine-tuning jobs to complete' and includes timeline recommendation to wait for job completion before A100 pool upgrade

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that GPU VMs cannot live migrate or that pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) or ensuring minimum replica availability during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not address the issue that auto-scaler will create nodes at old version during upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention testing GPU driver or CUDA compatibility in staging environment before production upgrade
